entry.title: Applebee's Big Easy Menu Returns
entry.summary:
The flavors of New Orleans are back at Applebee's with the return of the limited-time Big Easy Menu, with prices starting at $11.99.
Applebee's Big Easy Menu includes: - New Bayou Shrimp Bowl (pictured) - Blackened shrimp, Andouille sausage, Spanish rice, garlicky green beans, and sauteed bell peppers & onions with a side of creamy Cajun sauce. - New Big Easy Burger - A beef patty with pepper jack cheese, grilled Andouille sausage, zesty citrus slaw, and spicy honey mustard on a brioche bun, served with classic fries. - Bourbon Street Chicken & Andouille Sausage Penne (pictured) - Bourbon Street chicken, seared Andouille sausage slices, seasoned bell peppers, and onion in a Cajun Alfredo sauce over penne pasta. The menu also includes regular menu items such as the Bourbon Street Chicken & Shrimp Skillet, Bourbon Street Steak, and the Bourbon Street Mushroom Swiss Burger. In addition to the Big Easy Menu, Applebee's readies for St. Patrick's Day with a series of limited-time drinks, including: - New $6 Emerald Escape - Jameson Irish Whiskey, Malibu Coconut Rum, melon liqueur, blue raspberry, pineapple juice, and lime served in a signature Mucho glass garnished with a gold sugar rim. - New $6 Pricklycane - A fruity twist on a NOLA hurricane featuring Bacardi Superior Rum, premium lemon sour, prickly pear, orange, and pineapple juices. Like the Emerald Escape, it is served in a signature Mucho glass garnished with a gold sugar rim. - New $4 Parade Punch Mocktail - A blend of pineapple, prickly pear, blue raspberry, premium lemon sour, and lemon lime soda, garnished with a gold sugar-dusted lemon wedge. Photo via Applebee's. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Lucky Charms are Back at Cold Stone Creamery
entry.summary:
In time for St. Patrick's Day, Cold Stone Creamery has brought back its Lucky Charms lineup throughout March 2026. The chain also serves up its 2026 spring menu.
The seasonal Lucky Charms lineup includes:
Lucky Charms Ice Cream - Green-colored, sweet cream ice cream with Lucky Charms cereal. Ice Cream at the End of the Rainbow Creation (pictured) - Lucky Charms ice cream folded with Lucky Charms cereal, whipped topping, and gold glitter. Sprinkled with Charms Shake - Lucky Charms ice cream blended into a shake, crowned with whipped topping, Lucky Charms cereal, and a sprinkle of sparkling gold glitter. Green Waffle Cones Green Waffle Bowls
The 2026 spring menu is available now through May 12, 2026, and includes:
The Lemon Berry Batter Creation - Lemon Cake Batter ice cream folded with Lemon Oreo cookies, lemon pie filling, and strawberries. The Berry Best S'More Creation - Strawberry Marshmallow ice cream folded with fudge, marshmallow cream, and graham cracker pie crust.
Photo via Cold Stone Creamery. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Baskin-Robbins Churns Out New Banana Dulce de Leche Ice Cream and More
entry.summary:
Baskin-Robbins launches new Banana Dulce de Leche ice cream as its March 2026 Flavor of the Month. Additionally, the ice cream parlor chain offers suitably green desserts for St. Patrick's Day, a new Custom Cake in a Box, and a $6 Banana Split Wednesday deal for rewards members.
Baskin-Robbins' Banana Dulce de Leche ice cream is inspired by banoffee pie (a portmanteau of "banana" and "toffee"). The limited-time flavor features frozen banana custard and brown butter ice cream with toffee pieces and dulce de leche swirls. For St. Patrick's Day, the chain has a seasonal St. Patrick's Day ice cream cake as well as its regular-menu Mint Chocolate Chip Milkshake and Pre-Packed Quarts. Through the end of the month, Baskin-Robbins Rewards members can redeem a deal for $5 off a cake of $35 or more. Baskin-Robbins' new Custom Cake in a Box features your choice of cake, ice cream flavor, and toppings. It's a build-your-own option for the previously available Cake in a Box. The $6 Banana Split Wednesday deal is available every Wednesday in March for Baskin-Robbins Rewards members at participating locations nationwide. Prices vary, but a Banana Split normally costs $9.29 at my local Baskin-Robbins location here in Los Angeles. Photo via Baskin-Robbins. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Checkers & Rally's Serve Up New Flatbread Combos for $5 to $6
entry.summary:
Checkers & Rally's welcome new flatbread combo meals, featuring new Flatbread Sandwiches, with prices ranging from $5 to $6.
At the $5 mark, the Spicy Chicken Flatbread Combo includes a new Spicy Chicken Flatbread Sandwich, small Famous Seasoned Fries, and a small drink. The new sandwich features two halves of a spicy chicken patty, iceberg lettuce, tomato, and ranch, served in a grilled and folded flatbread. Starting at $6, the Bacon Burger Flatbread Combo includes the new Bacon Burger Flatbread Sandwich, small Famous Seasoned Fries, and a small drink. The Bacon Burger Flatbread Sandwich features two halves of a beef patty, American cheese, a strip of bacon, dill pickles, crispy-fried onions, lettuce, and Sweet 'N Smoky BBQ Sauce, served in a folded, grilled flatbread. Both Flatbread Sandwiches can also be purchased alone. Prices may vary, but the Spicy Chicken Flatbread Sandwich costs $3.99 near me in Los Angeles, while the Bacon Burger Flatbread Sandwich costs $4.99. Checkers & Rally's is also offering a limited-time deal where you can get two Big Bufords for $10 at participating locations. The Big Buford is the chains' signature premium burger and features two beef patties, two slices of American cheese, iceberg lettuce, tomato, red onion, dill pickles, ketchup, mustard, and mayo, on a toasted bakery-style bun. A Big Buford normally costs $6.99 near me. Photo via Checkers & Rally's. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Crumbl Bakes New Cookie Dough Pie
entry.summary:
Crumbl bakes its new Cookie Dough Pie as part of the dessert bakery chain's weekly rotation of desserts through March 14, 2026. Here's what the limited-time lineup looks like:
- Cookie Dough Pie (pictured)- Cookie dough-packed brown sugar cream cheese filling on a A brown sugar and graham pie crust, topped with fresh whipped cream, more cookie dough pieces, and mini chocolate chips. - Frosted Strawberry Cookie featuring Pop-Tarts - A warm, buttery cookie with a strawberry filling topped with a layer of melted white drops, crushed Frosted Strawberry Pop-Tarts, and flaky rainbow sugar. - Skillet Cookie - A warm semi-sweet chocolate chip cookie topped with a scoop of vanilla bean mousse and a drizzle of semi-sweet chocolate. - Peanut Butter Munch Cookie - A warm peanut butter cookie topped with milk chocolate, peanut butter-coated cereal pieces, and powdered sugar. On Thursday, Crumbl will be serving up Chocolate Chip Cookie Thins as its Thins Thursday special. Photo via Crumbl. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: New Chocolate Fudge & Caramel Empanadas Arrive at Taco Bell
entry.summary:
Taco Bell adds new Chocolate Fudge & Caramel Empanadas to the menu as a limited-time dessert offering inspired by the discontinued Caramel Apple Empanada.
The mini empanadas are sold in pairs and priced at $2.99. One is filled with salted caramel and has a regular crust, while the other features a chocolate fudge filling and a chocolaty shell. Additionally, the new, limited-time Sweet Empanadas & Cream Chiller joins the menu exclusively at Live Más Café locations across Southern California, Texas, and Las Vegas. The frozen drink features a vanilla ice cream base with swirls of caramel and Mexican chocolate syrup, finished with whipped cream. Photo via Taco Bell. Nutritional Info - Taco Bell Chocolate Fudge & Caramel Mini Dessert Emapandas Calories - 320 Fat - 15g (Saturated Fat - 4g) Sodium - 290mg Carbs - 42g (Sugar - 16g) Protein - 3g Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Pizza Hut Offers "$10 Any Pizza" Deal (up to 5 toppings)
entry.summary:
Pizza Hut is running a limited-time "$10 Any Pizza" deal, where you can get a large or medium pizza on either Original Pan, Hand Tossed, Thin 'n Crispy, or Chicago Tavern-Style crust with up to five toppings for $10 at participating locations nationwide.
The $10 Any Pizza deal is only available for carryout. Stuffed crust and extra toppings are available for an additional charge (it's $3 more for stuffed crust at my local Pizza Hut). A similar deal is running at rival Domino's. Photo via Pizza Hut. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Wendy's Welcomes New Cheesy Bacon Cheeseburger and More
entry.summary:
Wendy's serves up the new Cheesy Bacon Cheeseburger as its latest limited-time burger. The new menu item is joined by the new Chicken Tenders Ranch Wrap and the return of the chain's Crispy Panko Fish Sandwich.
The Cheesy Bacon Cheeseburger features a quarter-pound beef patty, applewood-smoked bacon, two slices of American cheese, and cheddar cheese sauce (the same sauce that you can get on the chain's baked potatoes), served on a toasted bun. The Chicken Tenders Ranch Wrap is similar to the Grilled Chicken Wrap, only with chicken tenders instead of grilled chicken. It features two crispy-fried chicken tenders, ranch, lettuce, and shredded cheddar cheese, wrapped in a warm flour tortilla. Available through April 5, 2026, Wendy's Crispy Panko Fish Sandwich features a crispy-fried, panko-crusted, wild-caught Alaskan pollock fish filet served with shredded lettuce, dill tartar sauce, American cheese, and crinkle-cut pickles on a toasted bun. Prices vary, but the Cheesy Bacon Cheeseburger ranges from $7.29 (with a single patty) to $9.29 (with triple patties) at my local Wendy's here in Los Angeles. The Chicken Tenders Ranch Wrap goes for $6.79, while the Crispy Panko Fish Sandwich is $6.29. Photo via Wendy's. Nutritional Info - Wendy's Cheesy Bacon Cheeseburger - Single Calories - 560 Fat - 33g (Saturated Fat - 15g) Sodium - 1180mg Carbs - 32g (Sugar - 5g) Protein - 34g Nutritional Info - Wendy's Chicken Tenders Ranch Wrap Calories - 590 Fat - 28g (Saturated Fat - 7g) Sodium - 1350mg Carbs - 54g (Sugar - 2g) Protein - 29g Nutritional Info - Wendy's Crispy Panko Fish Sandwich Calories - 510 Fat - 25g (Saturated Fat - 6g) Sodium - 1280mg Carbs - 51g (Sugar - 6g) Protein - 21g Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Taco Bell Launches New Chicken Bacon Ranch Street Chalupas and Chicken Bacon Ranch Nacho Fries
entry.summary:
Taco Bell launches new Chicken Bacon Ranch Street Chalupas and Chicken Bacon Ranch Nacho Fries for a limited time.
Chicken Bacon Ranch Chalupas come two to an order and feature two toasted cheddar mini Chalupa shells filled with slow-roasted chicken (i.e., Cantina chicken), bacon, pico de gallo, shredded cheddar cheese, and Avocado Ranch Sauce. The suggested price per order is $5.99. You can also get Chicken Bacon Ranch Street Chalupas as part of a $9 Discovery Luxe Box, which includes an order of Chicken Bacon Ranch Street Chalupas, a Cheesy Bean & Rice Burrito, chips and nacho cheese sauce, and a medium fountain drink. Chicken Bacon Ranch Nacho Fries feature seasoned fries topped with slow-roasted chicken, bacon, warm nacho cheese sauce, Avocado Ranch Sauce, and pico de gallo. It carries a suggested price of $4.99. Chicken Bacon Ranch is a combination that Taco Bell occasionally trots out on a limited-time basis. Other past items featuring the combination (that you probably don't remember) include the Bacon Ranch Tortada, Bacon Ranch Chicken Flatbread Sandwich, and more. The Bacon Club Chalupa was probably its most popular iteration. Photo via Taco Bell. Nutritional Info - Taco Bell Chicken Bacon Ranch Street Chalupas - 2 Chalupas Calories - 620 Fat - 41g (Saturated Fat - 11g) Sodium - 1220mg Carbs - 38g (Sugar - 4g) Protein - 25g Nutritional Info - Taco Bell Chicken Bacon Ranch Nacho Fries Calories - 350 Fat - 24g (Saturated Fat - 4g) Sodium - 940mg Carbs - 22g (Sugar - 2g) Protein - 13g Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Review: McDonald's - Big Arch Burger
entry.summary:
McDonald's Big Arch is a limited-time burger that features two quarter-pound beef patties, three slices of pasteurized process white cheddar cheese, crispy-fried onions, slivered fresh onions, pickles, shredded iceberg lettuce, and new Big Arch Sauce, served on a toasted sesame and poppy seed bun.
I paid $8.59 for a Big Arch at my local McDonald's.
Big Arch Sauce is described by McDonald's as "the perfect balance of mustard, pickle, and sweet tomato flavors. It comes off as a more mustard-forward, more complex, tangier take on Big Mac Sauce. It's familiar but different. They forgot the pickles on my burger, but I didn't miss them, as the Big Arch Sauce provided plenty of acidity.
The bun was softer but less plush than the typical McDonald's sesame seed bun. It didn't have the same spring as the regular bun. The poppy seeds added some visual appeal and a smattering of texture.
The beef patties were moist, sporting a coarse grind and a well-seared crust, providing an enjoyable mix of flavor and texture. The white cheddar was milder than American cheese. It was nicely melted and complemented the beef well. The crispy onions provided a bit of sweetness and delicate crispiness, while the slivered onions were good for a watery crunch and onion-y bite. The lettuce was mostly there for visual appeal and color.
Overall, McDonald's Big Arch turned out pretty well. It's basically a meatier, cheesier, and slightly fancier take on the chain's signature Big Mac (minus the middle bun). Nutritional Info - McDonald's Big Arch Calories - 1020 Fat - 65g (Saturated Fat - 25g) Sodium - 1760mg Carbs - 59g (Sugar - 10g) Protein - 53g Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Wingstop Offers 30 Wings for $30
entry.summary:
Wingstop is running a limited-time promotion where you can get 30 wings for $30 at participating locations nationwide.
The deal can be used on boneless, traditional (bone-in) wings, or mix-and-match wings for carryout or dine-in (i.e., it's not available for delivery. You can pick up to three flavors, but dips will cost extra. Prices vary, but an order of 15 traditional wings at Wingstop near me in Los Angeles typically costs $19.79 ($17.69 for boneless), which comes to about $1.31 per wing. Photo via Wingstop. Read more at Brand Eating!

entry.title: Review: Trader Joe's - Toasted Coconut Mini Sheet Cake
entry.summary:
Trader Joe's Toasted Coconut Mini Sheet Cake is described on its lid as a "moist, flavorful toasted coconut cake with a toasted coconut cream cheese frosting." It's a limited-time, seasonal item.
An 18-oz cake cost me $5.99.
The Toasted Coconut Mini Sheet Cake was dense and very moist (from a combination of coconut milk and buttermilk). The combination of cake and frosting was sweet but not too sweet. It was less sweet than similar Trader Joe's cakes that I've tried.
There was a moderate and pleasant coconut flavor throughout, and the added texture of shredded coconut in both the icing and the cake. However, despite the description, I didn't pick up on any toasted coconut notes; it just tasted like plain coconut.
When it comes down to it, Trader Joe's Toasted Coconut Mini Sheet Cake made for good eating. I particularly enjoyed the flavor and sweetness level. Nutritional Info - Trader Joe's Toasted Coconut Mini Sheet Cake Serving Size - 1/6 cake (85g) Calories - 320 Fat - 16g (Saturated Fat - 9g) Sodium - 230mg Carbs - 40g (Sugar - 28g) Protein - 3g Read more at Brand Eating!
